mapper.insert: insert into stock_check_plan (plan_name, status, create_user, create_time, remark) values (#{planName}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
update stock_check_plan
plan_name = #{planName},
status = #{status},
complete_time = #{completeTime},
remark = #{remark},
where id = #{id}
